productName: VICE - Hash Rosin Peach Tea - 100mg THC : 100mg CBG - DOH
description: A chef-inspired soft, juicy peach cannabis drink made for sipping cold, with bright flavor, a clean finish, and a smooth infused lift. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity. Bright, easy-drinking, and infused for a smooth edible-style experience.
